channel.title: FOWL AI
channel.description: Career signals for the AI economy — AI jobs, vetted training platforms, and plain-English breakdowns of what's actually happening in AI. Free, every Monday.

item.title: Issue 9: LLMs, Agents, MCP, RAG — what do these terms actually mean?
item.description: A plain-English breakdown of the 5 AI terms you keep hearing but nobody explains: LLM, Agent, MCP, RAG, and Context Window.

item.title: Issue 8: 2 platforms. 8 contracts.
item.description: A full breakdown of every AI training contract I'm running right now — across 2 platforms, current and past, with real pay.

item.title: Issue 7: Some of the highest-paid AI work right now is trying to break it.
item.description: Companies are paying people to break their AI — and the highest earners aren't engineers. Here's the red-teaming opportunity almost no one is talking about.

item.title: Issue 6: The Layoff Map
item.description: 56% of 2026 layoffs cite AI. 156,000 workers affected. But Klarna just rehired the people it fired. The real story is more complicated — and more useful — than the headline.

item.title: Issue 5: Stop Learning "AI." Start Learning AI For What You Do.
item.description: AI skills mean something different depending on your job. The role-by-role breakdown — what to start, what to build toward, and where the real opportunity is.

item.title: Issue 4: The AI Model Map
item.description: 6 companies. 20+ models. What they cost, who ranks them, and which one is actually worth your money.

item.title: Issue 3: The Rise of the AI Manager
item.description: The highest-paying jobs of the next five years may not involve doing the work. They may involve managing the AI agents that do it for you.

item.title: Issue 2: 14 hours a week. $4k last month.
item.description: Job or no job — the knowledge you've built in your field is exactly what AI evaluation platforms pay for. Here's what that looks like in practice.

item.title: Issue 1: AI is quietly rewriting career leverage
item.description: AI is quietly rewriting career leverage — Issue 1 of FOWL AI, the weekly signal for knowledge workers navigating the AI transition.
